overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through the Kabuki district of Night City. The player approaches a street food stall, passes through an outdoor seating area, and crosses a neon-lit intersection beneath towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements.

events.description: descends from elevated view toward street-level market area

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the plaza toward a lit food stall, observing the neon cityscape

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscrapers with pink and teal neon signage against night sky
red street food stall with illuminated signage and metal counter
large floating advertisements on building facades with bright neon colors
tall palm tree silhouetted against the neon city lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of Night City's neon skyline from an elevated plaza. The camera descends toward a street-level market area, approaching a red food stall with glowing signage. The atmosphere is thick with cyberpunk aesthetic—towering glass buildings covered in holographic advertisements illuminate the hazy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food stall with serving counter

events.description: slows approach to food stall counter, briefly stopping in front of vendor

agents.ego_description: approaching the food stall counter and pausing briefly in front of the vendor

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind counter wearing teal tank top and white headband, gesturing with hand

entered.detail: male vendor in teal tank top standing behind the serving counter
decorative ceramic jars with blue patterns lined on the counter
illuminated red menu display showing food items above the counter

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the Masami Market food stall, entering the shelter of its red canopy. A vendor in a teal tank top stands behind the metal counter lined with ceramic jars. The lighting shifts to the warm artificial glow of the stall's neon menu boards as the camera pauses briefly before the vendor.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining area with scattered seating

events.description: passes the food stall and enters the outdoor seating plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the outdoor seating area past plastic chairs and tables

notable_agents.action: person sitting at food prep station working behind the counter

entered.detail: open plaza with scattered plastic chairs and tables for dining
red and white plastic chairs arranged around small tables
large green patio umbrella shading outdoor tables
secondary food service counter with steam and cooking equipment

segments.scene_description: Moving past the food stall, the camera enters an outdoor dining plaza filled with plastic chairs and tables. A secondary food prep station is visible to the right with someone working behind it. The area is partially covered by awnings and umbrellas, with the neon skyline still visible in the background.

events.description: approaches and steps onto yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the street
crosses the street and reaches the opposite sidewalk under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk with other pedestrians while vehicles pass nearby

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past the crosswalk with headlights on

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes on dark asphalt
elevated highway structure with concrete pillars spanning the street
illuminated sign indicating the Kabuki district

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the seating area and approaches a wide intersection, stepping onto a yellow-striped crosswalk. Other pedestrians walk in the same direction while futuristic vehicles pass on the left. The elevated highway overpass looms ahead as the camera crosses the street toward the Kabuki district sign.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, following the street

entered.detail: black metal fence running along the right side of the sidewalk
massive concrete support columns for the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: Now on the opposite side of the street, the camera walks along a sidewalk beneath the massive concrete overpass. The space feels more enclosed with the highway structure overhead and a metal fence running along the right side. The neon glow of distant billboards reflects off the wet pavement as the journey continues deeper into the Kabuki district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated view of a neon skyline down into the dense, enclosed corridors of the Kabuki district. It begins by descending from a wide plaza toward a street-level market, where the hazy night air is illuminated by towering holographic advertisements. As the camera enters the shelter of a red food stall, the lighting shifts to a warm artificial glow before moving past the vendor into an outdoor dining plaza filled with plastic furniture and awnings. The scene then opens up as the camera leaves the seating area to cross a yellow-striped intersection amidst futuristic vehicles and pedestrians, heading toward a looming highway overpass. Finally, the perspective shifts into a more enclosed space beneath the massive concrete structure, where the neon glow of distant billboards reflects off the wet pavement along a fenced sidewalk.
